steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, the two equations must be equivalent. Compare the constant terms.
$$
\frac{\frac{21}{4}}{\frac{3}{5}}=\frac{21}{4}\cdot\frac{5}{3}=\frac{35}{4}
$$

steps.title: Scale the coefficients
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation's coefficients by the same scale factor.
$$
g=\frac{35}{4}\cdot\frac{3}{7}=\frac{15}{4}
$$
$$
k=\frac{35}{4}\cdot\frac{11}{7}=\frac{55}{4}
$$
